channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Pothole is now the width of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 7th March
item.description:
Despite you flagging my previous report as fixed, the Black Bins are still not emptied. Please stop lying and flagging issues as fixed when clearly the bins have not been emptied.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 7th March
item.description:
The black bins have not been emptied on the whole street!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress base (double), 7th March
item.description:
Please remove as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Has been here for 2 months and getting worse by the day. Right in centre of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light still not working, 7th March
item.description:
Reported on 3rd March 2026 ref no 9033329 says has been fixed still not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windsor Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 7th March
item.description:
There is rubbish dumped from cars along the kerbside on both sides of St Andrews Drive and also near the drains rubbish which needs sweeping on a regular basis. This is an eyesore for the area but is just ignored and used as a dumping ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camberwell Green SE5, front of Peabody buildings. Non-offensive tag on cycle hanger., 7th March
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man defecated outside the gate to our flat., 7th March
item.description:
We do have a problem of drug users hanging around outside our flat. One tried to enter the building next door when a supermarket shopping was delivered on 6th March. This man was caught on camera at 6:30am Thursday 5th March.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 7th March
item.description:
Bin overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Bags Dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Several rubbish bags (some split spilling rubbish onto the road) dumped on Tyler Street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe deterioration of road surface on Liverpool Rd northbound, North of Islington Pk St, 7th March
item.description:
This surface of this stretch of road has been deteriorating for a while, but it's now become seriously hazardous to cyclists having gone back in places to cobble stones, creating deep potholes and loads of loose material on the carriageway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 331, Liverpool Road, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It is blocking parking spaces where people charge their electric cars, 7th March
item.description:
Taking all the neighbours space for charging their car and disrupting all the other neighbours parking as the road is a cull-de-sac and very small

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Black sofa is fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Kinsale Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
2 Carlton Cottages junction of Pomeroy Streer. Remove graffiti from side wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to cycle hangar, ripped metal shark edges, 7th March
item.description:
This cycle hangar has been damaged by a motor vehicle leaving sharp and jagged metal edges. it is on Aysgarth Rd near the corner if Turney Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aysgarth Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind bin shed and in bin shed of 99 Brondesbury Villas, 7th March
item.description:
There is 1 general waste bin shared between 4 flats, with multiple tenants living in each flat. The 1 bin appears to be insufficient for the number of residents. Collections also seem to have been refused at times due to incorrect waste being placed in bins by different tenants. The bin is now frequently full and bags are piling up around the bin area. This has become a hygiene issue and residents currently have nowhere to dispose of household waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: FLY TIPPING AGAIN on MESSY GLENISTER ROAD, 7th March
item.description:
Fly tipping AGAIN on Glenister Road. Broken pieces of wood, a fridge, poo! When are the council going to take responsibility in stopping this unlawful behaviour which compromises the safety of their residents and young children? This is becoming a Joke. Please install the camera. Otherwise who knows what will be dumped next.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Caletock Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two 10 inch potholes middle of Chislehurst Road, 7th March
item.description:
These potholes have been there for more than 6 months. They have damaged my car costing hundreds of pounds worth of repairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmcroft Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
Bp Garage 747-759 Old Kent Road. Large amount of graffiti on side and rear of Londis store

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
